Fleet Officer Job at May & Baker Nigeria Plc




        
    

        
        May & Baker Nigeria Plc was founded on September 4, 1944 as Nigeria's first pharmaceutical company. It has its origin in England, the United Kingdom in 1834 where three chemists founded Grimwade, May & Pickett, a firm for manufacturing chemicals for pharmaceutical products.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fleet Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full time

About the job
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The incumbent must possess an HND/B.Sc in Transport Management, Logistics, Facilities Management or any social science related field
	Must have a minimum of three years cognate experience in Fleet Management.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Content Marketer",
  "description": "Right Click Technologies LTD is a leading IT consulting and services company that provides top-notch technology solutions to businesses of all sizes. We specialize in providing tailored solutions that meet our clients&rsquo; unique business needs and deliver outstanding results. With over 10 years of experience in the industry, our team of experts is committed to delivering innovative and reliable technology solutions that help our clients achieve their business goals. We are passionate about technology and are constantly pushing the boundaries to provide our clients with the latest and most advanced technology solutions. Whether you are looking for IT consulting, software development, ICT equipment supply, enterprise infrastructure management, renewable energy solutions, or digital marketing services, Right Click Technologies has the expertise and experience to help you succeed.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Marketer
Job Location: Garki, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Contract to Hire

Role Overview


	As a Content Marketer, you will work directly with our portfolio companies to develop and execute content strategies that enhance their brand presence, drive engagement, and support business objectives.
	You will be responsible for creating high-quality content, scheduling posts across platforms, and monitoring performance metrics to optimise results.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement content strategies for the companies in alignment with their business goals.
	Create engaging content for social media, blogs, newsletters, websites, and other digital platforms.
	Schedule and publish posts across multiple social media channels using content management and scheduling tools.
	Monitor and respond to audience engagement, building a consistent brand voice and community interaction.
	Analyze content performance metrics and provide actionable insights to improve reach, engagement, and conversion.
	Collaborate with portfolio company teams, designers, and external agencies to maintain high-quality content output.
	Stay updated on content marketing trends, social media best practices, and emerging platforms.


What Success Looks Like


	Consistent, high?quality posting (12 posts per week)
	A growing audience that asks intelligent, technical questions.
	Increased qualified leads and inquiries.
	Strong brand trust for both TINSE&reg; and Right Click Technologies Ltd


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in any relevant field
	2+ years of experience in content marketing, social media management, or digital marketing.
	Strong writing, video editing, and storytelling skills.
	Experience with scheduling tools (e.g., Buffer, Hootsuite, HubSpot, Later, or equivalent).
	Familiarity with SEO, email marketing, and content analytics tools.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
	Strong communication skills and a collaborative mindset.


Nice to Have:


	Experience working with startups or multiple companies simultaneously.
	Basic graphic design or video editing skills.
	Knowledge of trends in your portfolio companies&rsquo; industries.


Salary

Content Marketer Job at Right Click Technologies LTD




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Right Click Technologies LTD is a leading IT consulting and services company that provides top-notch technology solutions to businesses of all sizes. We specialize in providing tailored solutions that meet our clients’ unique business needs and deliver outstanding results. With over 10 years of experience in the industry, our team of experts is committed to delivering innovative and reliable technology solutions that help our clients achieve their business goals. We are passionate about technology and are constantly pushing the boundaries to provide our clients with the latest and most advanced technology solutions. Whether you are looking for IT consulting, software development, ICT equipment supply, enterprise infrastructure management, renewable energy solutions, or digital marketing services, Right Click Technologies has the expertise and experience to help you succeed.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Marketer
Job Location: Garki, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Contract to Hire

Role Overview


	As a Content Marketer, you will work directly with our portfolio companies to develop and execute content strategies that enhance their brand presence, drive engagement, and support business objectives.
	You will be responsible for creating high-quality content, scheduling posts across platforms, and monitoring performance metrics to optimise results.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement content strategies for the companies in alignment with their business goals.
	Create engaging content for social media, blogs, newsletters, websites, and other digital platforms.
	Schedule and publish posts across multiple social media channels using content management and scheduling tools.
	Monitor and respond to audience engagement, building a consistent brand voice and community interaction.
	Analyze content performance metrics and provide actionable insights to improve reach, engagement, and conversion.
	Collaborate with portfolio company teams, designers, and external agencies to maintain high-quality content output.
	Stay updated on content marketing trends, social media best practices, and emerging platforms.


What Success Looks Like


	Consistent, high?quality posting (12 posts per week)
	A growing audience that asks intelligent, technical questions.
	Increased qualified leads and inquiries.
	Strong brand trust for both TINSE® and Right Click Technologies Ltd


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor’s Degree in any relevant field
	2+ years of experience in content marketing, social media management, or digital marketing.
	Strong writing, video editing, and storytelling skills.
	Experience with scheduling tools (e.g., Buffer, Hootsuite, HubSpot, Later, or equivalent).
	Familiarity with SEO, email marketing, and content analytics tools.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
	Strong communication skills and a collaborative mindset.


Nice to Have:


	Experience working with startups or multiple companies simultaneously.
	Basic graphic design or video editing skills.
	Knowledge of trends in your portfolio companies’ industries.


Salary

        Click here to Apply

We specialize in providing tailored solutions that meet our clients&rsquo; unique business needs and deliver outstanding results. With over 10 years of experience in the industry, our team of experts is committed to delivering innovative and reliable technology solutions that help our clients achieve their business goals. We are passionate about technology and are constantly pushing the boundaries to provide our clients with the latest and most advanced technology solutions. Whether you are looking for IT consulting, software development, ICT equipment supply, enterprise infrastructure management, renewable energy solutions, or digital marketing services, Right Click Technologies has the expertise and experience to help you succeed.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Marketer
Job Location: Garki, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Contract to Hire

Role Overview


	As a Content Marketer, you will work directly with our portfolio companies to develop and execute content strategies that enhance their brand presence, drive engagement, and support business objectives.
	You will be responsible for creating high-quality content, scheduling posts across platforms, and monitoring performance metrics to optimise results.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement content strategies for the companies in alignment with their business goals.
	Create engaging content for social media, blogs, newsletters, websites, and other digital platforms.
	Schedule and publish posts across multiple social media channels using content management and scheduling tools.
	Monitor and respond to audience engagement, building a consistent brand voice and community interaction.
	Analyze content performance metrics and provide actionable insights to improve reach, engagement, and conversion.
	Collaborate with portfolio company teams, designers, and external agencies to maintain high-quality content output.
	Stay updated on content marketing trends, social media best practices, and emerging platforms.


What Success Looks Like


	Consistent, high?quality posting (12 posts per week)
	A growing audience that asks intelligent, technical questions.
	Increased qualified leads and inquiries.
	Strong brand trust for both TINSE&reg; and Right Click Technologies Ltd


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in any relevant field
	2+ years of experience in content marketing, social media management, or digital marketing.
	Strong writing, video editing, and storytelling skills.
	Experience with scheduling tools (e.g., Buffer, Hootsuite, HubSpot, Later, or equivalent).
	Familiarity with SEO, email marketing, and content analytics tools.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
	Strong communication skills and a collaborative mindset.


Nice to Have:


	Experience working with startups or multiple companies simultaneously.
	Basic graphic design or video editing skills.
	Knowledge of trends in your portfolio companies&rsquo; industries.


Salary

Right Click Technologies LTD is a leading IT consulting and services company that provides top-notch technology solutions to businesses of all sizes. We specialize in providing tailored solutions that meet our clients’ unique business needs and deliver outstanding results. With over 10 years of experience in the industry, our team of experts is committed to delivering innovative and reliable technology solutions that help our clients achieve their business goals. We are passionate about technology and are constantly pushing the boundaries to provide our clients with the latest and most advanced technology solutions. Whether you are looking for IT consulting, software development, ICT equipment supply, enterprise infrastructure management, renewable energy solutions, or digital marketing services, Right Click Technologies has the expertise and experience to help you succeed.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Marketer
Job Location: Garki, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Contract to Hire

Role Overview


	As a Content Marketer, you will work directly with our portfolio companies to develop and execute content strategies that enhance their brand presence, drive engagement, and support business objectives.
	You will be responsible for creating high-quality content, scheduling posts across platforms, and monitoring performance metrics to optimise results.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement content strategies for the companies in alignment with their business goals.
	Create engaging content for social media, blogs, newsletters, websites, and other digital platforms.
	Schedule and publish posts across multiple social media channels using content management and scheduling tools.
	Monitor and respond to audience engagement, building a consistent brand voice and community interaction.
	Analyze content performance metrics and provide actionable insights to improve reach, engagement, and conversion.
	Collaborate with portfolio company teams, designers, and external agencies to maintain high-quality content output.
	Stay updated on content marketing trends, social media best practices, and emerging platforms.


What Success Looks Like


	Consistent, high?quality posting (12 posts per week)
	A growing audience that asks intelligent, technical questions.
	Increased qualified leads and inquiries.
	Strong brand trust for both TINSE® and Right Click Technologies Ltd


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor’s Degree in any relevant field
	2+ years of experience in content marketing, social media management, or digital marketing.
	Strong writing, video editing, and storytelling skills.
	Experience with scheduling tools (e.g., Buffer, Hootsuite, HubSpot, Later, or equivalent).
	Familiarity with SEO, email marketing, and content analytics tools.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
	Strong communication skills and a collaborative mindset.


Nice to Have:


	Experience working with startups or multiple companies simultaneously.
	Basic graphic design or video editing skills.
	Knowledge of trends in your portfolio companies’ industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Data Entry Officer

Job Location: Mowe, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Data Entry Officer is responsible for accurately entering, updating, and maintaining company records and operational data.
	The role requires strong attention to detail, speed, and accuracy in handling data while ensuring proper documentation and record management.


Key Responsibilities


	Enter and update company data accurately into relevant systems
	Maintain and organize digital and physical records
	Review data for errors and ensure accuracy and completeness
	Ensure confidentiality and proper handling of company information
	Assist departments with data-related tasks when required.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV or Applications to: stellarinternationalhr@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Data Entry Officer Job at Stellar International Company Limited




        
    

        
        Stellar International Company Limited is a subsidiary of RSIN Group, which entered Africa in 2008. Stellar International Co. Ltd has three businesses, namely Recycling Ant, Ant Express, and Antshop Online.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Data Entry Officer

Job Location: Mowe, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Data Entry Officer is responsible for accurately entering, updating, and maintaining company records and operational data.
	The role requires strong attention to detail, speed, and accuracy in handling data while ensuring proper documentation and record management.


Key Responsibilities


	Enter and update company data accurately into relevant systems
	Maintain and organize digital and physical records
	Review data for errors and ensure accuracy and completeness
	Ensure confidentiality and proper handling of company information
	Assist departments with data-related tasks when required.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV or Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Finance Manager",
  "description": "JNO Integrated Services is a dynamic HR consultancy firm dedicated to helping businesses build strong, efficient, and compliant workforces. We specialize in providing tailored HR solutions, including talent acquisition, employee training, performance management, and HR advisory services. Our team of experts is committed to aligning HR strategies with business goals, ensuring that our clients have the right talent and systems in place to thrive in today&rsquo;s competitive market.

At JNO Integrated Services, we understand the complexities of managing people and the importance of compliance with labor laws. We provide strategic guidance and operational support, empowering organizations to maximize employee potential and drive growth. Whether you&rsquo;re a small business looking to scale or a large corporation seeking to streamline HR processes, we&rsquo;re here to deliver results.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Finance Manager will oversee the financial operations of the company, ensuring sound financial management, accurate reporting, regulatory compliance, and effective cash flow management.
	The role involves managing finances for both local and international procurement activities, B2B and B2C sales operations, inventory-related transactions, vendor payments, and overall financial planning to support business growth and profitability.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily financial and accounting operations of the company.
	Prepare financial reports, budgets, and cash flow projections.
	Manage accounts payable, receivable, and bank reconciliations.
	Monitor financial activities relating to local and international procurement.
	Ensure accurate product costing, pricing, and profitability analysis.
	Supervise invoicing, collections, and credit control for B2B and B2C clients.
	Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory remittances.
	Maintain effective internal controls and financial procedures.
	Coordinate with external auditors, banks, and regulatory agencies.
	Provide financial insights and recommendations to support business growth.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or related field.
	Minimum of 8 years of experience in finance or accounting roles.
	Professional certification such as ICAN, ACCA, or ACA is an added advantage.
	Experience in trading, procurement, supply chain, importation, or distribution businesses is highly preferred.
	Experience handling both local and international financial transactions.
	Knowledge of B2B and B2C business operations is an advantage.


Method of APplication&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment.jnoservices@gmail.com using &quot;Finance Manager - Abuja&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Our team of experts is committed to aligning HR strategies with business goals, ensuring that our clients have the right talent and systems in place to thrive in today’s competitive market.

At JNO Integrated Services, we understand the complexities of managing people and the importance of compliance with labor laws. We provide strategic guidance and operational support, empowering organizations to maximize employee potential and drive growth. Whether you’re a small business looking to scale or a large corporation seeking to streamline HR processes, we’re here to deliver results.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Finance Manager will oversee the financial operations of the company, ensuring sound financial management, accurate reporting, regulatory compliance, and effective cash flow management.
	The role involves managing finances for both local and international procurement activities, B2B and B2C sales operations, inventory-related transactions, vendor payments, and overall financial planning to support business growth and profitability.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily financial and accounting operations of the company.
	Prepare financial reports, budgets, and cash flow projections.
	Manage accounts payable, receivable, and bank reconciliations.
	Monitor financial activities relating to local and international procurement.
	Ensure accurate product costing, pricing, and profitability analysis.
	Supervise invoicing, collections, and credit control for B2B and B2C clients.
	Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory remittances.
	Maintain effective internal controls and financial procedures.
	Coordinate with external auditors, banks, and regulatory agencies.
	Provide financial insights and recommendations to support business growth.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or related field.
	Minimum of 8 years of experience in finance or accounting roles.
	Professional certification such as ICAN, ACCA, or ACA is an added advantage.
	Experience in trading, procurement, supply chain, importation, or distribution businesses is highly preferred.
	Experience handling both local and international financial transactions.
	Knowledge of B2B and B2C business operations is an advantage.


Method of APplication 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Finance Manager - Abuja" as the subject of the email.
